# assets/

Visual assets for the README — generated by `scripts/make_readme_assets.py`.

```bash
# Regenerate all assets (solver-only mode)
python scripts/make_readme_assets.py

# With custom config
python scripts/make_readme_assets.py --config configs/assets.yaml
```

## Generated files

| File                    | Description                                        |
| ----------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| `hero.gif`              | Side-by-side solver vs FNO rollout animation       |
| `error.gif`             | Animated error field over rollout time              |
| `spectra.png`           | Spectral comparison (solver / baseline / FNO)      |
| `benchmark.png`         | Runtime bar chart with speedup annotations         |
| `rollout_error.png`     | MSE & relative L2 vs rollout steps                 |
| `rollout_comparison.png`| Truth / prediction / error panel                   |

Assets marked above require ML checkpoints; in **solver-only mode** only
`hero.gif` (two solver seeds) is produced.
